analysis.summary: Godot Engine is a cross-platform 2D and 3D game engine written primarily in C++ that provides a comprehensive game development framework with editor, runtime, and multi-platform export capabilities.
capabilities: 2D and 3D game rendering with various graphics APIs (core/config/engine.cpp, platform/*/display_server_*.cpp)
Cross-platform compilation and deployment to desktop, mobile, web and console platforms (platform/ directory structure)
Visual scripting system and GDScript language support (modules/gdscript/)
Physics simulation for both 2D and 3D environments (modules/physics_*/, servers/physics_*/)
Audio processing and playback with WASAPI, ALSA, and other audio backends (drivers/wasapi/, drivers/alsa/)
Resource management and asset pipeline (core/io/, editor/import/)
Scene tree management and node-based architecture (scene/ directory)
Extension system for native code integration (core/extension/gdextension.cpp)
Built-in editor with visual scene editing (editor/ directory)
Multi-language binding support including C#, Java, Kotlin (modules/mono/, platform/android/java/)
technical_stack: Python (build system and tools, SConstruct, 126+ .py files)

technical_facts: 2D and 3D game rendering with various graphics APIs (core/config/engine.cpp, platform/*/display_server_*.cpp)
Cross-platform compilation and deployment to desktop, mobile, web and console platforms (platform/ directory structure)
Visual scripting system and GDScript language support (modules/gdscript/)
Physics simulation for both 2D and 3D environments (modules/physics_*/, servers/physics_*/)
Audio processing and playback with WASAPI, ALSA, and other audio backends (drivers/wasapi/, drivers/alsa/)
Resource management and asset pipeline (core/io/, editor/import/)
Scene tree management and node-based architecture (scene/ directory)
Extension system for native code integration (core/extension/gdextension.cpp)
Built-in editor with visual scene editing (editor/ directory)
Multi-language binding support including C#, Java, Kotlin (modules/mono/, platform/android/java/)

architecture_patterns: Concurrency: multi-threaded with dedicated render thread, physics thread, and worker thread pool (core/templates/thread_work_pool.h)
dependencies: Infrastructure: No external databases or services required
deployment_options: CI/CD: GitHub Actions (inferred from project structure)

functional_dna.logic_archetype_evidence: Scene tree management and node-based architecture (scene/ directory) - manages complex hierarchical state and coordinates multiple subsystems including rendering, physics, audio, and input
functional_dna.data_contract_evidence: Resource management and asset pipeline (core/io/, editor/import/) - requires specific file formats and structured scene definitions
functional_dna.core_algorithmic_evidence: Scene tree management and node-based architecture (scene/ directory) - implements hierarchical graph traversal and manipulation for scene graphs
functional_dna.concurrency_evidence: Concurrency: multi-threaded with dedicated render thread, physics thread, and worker thread pool (core/templates/thread_work_pool.h) - designed for real-time performance over consistency
functional_dna.repurposing_reasoning: High modularity with platform/ directory structure and extension system suggests good separation of concerns, but game engine architecture is highly specialized for real-time rendering and simulation

evidence_claims.evidence: Cross-platform compilation and deployment to desktop, mobile, web and console platforms (platform/ directory structure)
Extension system for native code integration (core/extension/gdextension.cpp)
Concurrency: multi-threaded with dedicated render thread, physics thread, and worker thread pool (core/templates/thread_work_pool.h)
Multi-language binding support including C#, Java, Kotlin (modules/mono/, platform/android/java/)

analysis.summary: Home Assistant is an open-source home automation platform that provides local control and privacy for IoT devices. It processes device integrations, manages user authentication, serves a web UI, and orchestrates automation rules through a modular architecture supporting thousands of device types.
capabilities: Manages user authentication and authorization with multiple MFA modules (homeassistant/auth/)
Processes device integrations through component system with 2000+ integrations (homeassistant/components/)
Serves REST API endpoints for device control and state management (homeassistant/components/api/)
Provides WebSocket interface for real-time updates (homeassistant/components/websocket_api/)
Executes automation rules and triggers based on device states and events
Manages configuration through YAML files and UI-based config flows
Handles media streaming through Go2RTC integration (homeassistant/components/go2rtc/)
Supports backup and restore functionality (homeassistant/backup_restore.py)
Processes voice commands and intents through conversation system
integrations: FFmpeg for media processing (ha-ffmpeg 3.2.2 in requirements.txt)
Various IoT device manufacturers (homeassistant/brands/ directory with 100+ brand files)

api_endpoints.path: REST /api/* — Device control and state management APIs

technical_facts: Manages user authentication and authorization with multiple MFA modules (homeassistant/auth/)
Processes device integrations through component system with 2000+ integrations (homeassistant/components/)
Serves REST API endpoints for device control and state management (homeassistant/components/api/)
Provides WebSocket interface for real-time updates (homeassistant/components/websocket_api/)
Executes automation rules and triggers based on device states and events
Manages configuration through YAML files and UI-based config flows
Handles media streaming through Go2RTC integration (homeassistant/components/go2rtc/)
Supports backup and restore functionality (homeassistant/backup_restore.py)
Processes voice commands and intents through conversation system

architecture_patterns: Concurrency: async/await with asyncio event loop for handling concurrent device communications and API requests
deployment_options: CI/CD: GitHub Actions (inferred from CODEOWNERS and repository structure)

functional_dna.logic_archetype_evidence: Executes automation rules and triggers based on device states and events, manages configuration through YAML files and UI-based config flows, processes device integrations through component system with 2000+ integrations
functional_dna.data_contract_evidence: YAML configuration support via PyYAML 6.0.3 (requirements.txt), manages configuration through YAML files and UI-based config flows, SQLAlchemy 2.0.41 for database ORM (requirements.txt)
functional_dna.core_algorithmic_evidence: SQLAlchemy 2.0.41 for database ORM (requirements.txt), serves REST API endpoints for device control and state management (homeassistant/components/api/), supports backup and restore functionality (homeassistant/backup_restore.py)
functional_dna.concurrency_evidence: asyncio for concurrency (homeassistant/__main__.py, core.py), provides WebSocket interface for real-time updates (homeassistant/components/websocket_api/), aiohttp 3.13.3 for HTTP server (requirements.txt)
functional_dna.repurposing_reasoning: High repurposing potential due to modular component system with 2000+ integrations, well-defined API structure, and event-driven orchestration patterns. The stateful orchestrator pattern is applicable to many domains requiring coordination of distributed systems.

evidence_claims.claim: Uses SQLAlchemy ORM for database operations

evidence_claims.evidence: Serves REST API endpoints for device control and state management (homeassistant/components/api/), provides WebSocket interface for real-time updates (homeassistant/components/websocket_api/)

analysis.summary: Odoo is a comprehensive open-source enterprise resource planning (ERP) system that provides a suite of integrated business applications including CRM, eCommerce, accounting, inventory management, and project management through a modular addon architecture.
capabilities: Provides OAuth2 authentication integration with external providers (addons/auth_oauth/controllers/main.py)
Implements WebAuthn/passkey authentication for passwordless login (addons/auth_passkey/controllers/main.py)
Handles user registration, password reset, and signup workflows (addons/auth_signup/controllers/main.py)
Manages business accounting operations including invoicing and financial reporting (addons/account/)
Processes HTTP requests through web controllers with session management (multiple controller files)
Supports multi-database operations with database filtering and selection
Provides REST API endpoints through JSON-RPC protocol
Implements modular addon system for extending functionality (46+ addon directories)
technical_stack: Werkzeug web framework (import statements in controllers)
integrations: OAuth2 providers (Google, Facebook, etc.) via auth_oauth addon

technical_facts: Provides OAuth2 authentication integration with external providers (addons/auth_oauth/controllers/main.py)
Implements WebAuthn/passkey authentication for passwordless login (addons/auth_passkey/controllers/main.py)
Handles user registration, password reset, and signup workflows (addons/auth_signup/controllers/main.py)
Manages business accounting operations including invoicing and financial reporting (addons/account/)
Processes HTTP requests through web controllers with session management (multiple controller files)
Supports multi-database operations with database filtering and selection
Provides REST API endpoints through JSON-RPC protocol
Implements modular addon system for extending functionality (46+ addon directories)

architecture_patterns: Concurrency: gevent-based async processing with greenlet coroutines

functional_dna.logic_archetype_evidence: Implements modular addon system for extending functionality (46+ addon directories), manages business accounting operations including invoicing and financial reporting, and processes HTTP requests through web controllers with session management
functional_dna.data_contract_evidence: Uses PostgreSQL database (implied from ORM patterns), manages business accounting operations with structured financial data, and implements JSON-RPC protocol for API endpoints
functional_dna.core_algorithmic_evidence: Manages business accounting operations including invoicing and financial reporting (addons/account/), handles user registration, password reset, and signup workflows, and supports multi-database operations with database filtering and selection
functional_dna.concurrency_evidence: Uses PostgreSQL database for business accounting operations and financial reporting, requires data consistency for financial transactions and multi-database operations
functional_dna.repurposing_reasoning: High confidence due to modular addon architecture (46+ addon directories) that allows extending functionality, comprehensive authentication systems (OAuth2, WebAuthn, traditional), and well-defined API endpoints. The ERP core can be adapted to various business domains by leveraging its orchestration patterns.

evidence_claims.claim: Implements modular addon system for extensibility
evidence_claims.evidence: Implements modular addon system for extending functionality (46+ addon directories)

Provides OAuth2 authentication integration with external providers (addons/auth_oauth/controllers/main.py), Implements WebAuthn/passkey authentication for passwordless login (addons/auth_passkey/controllers/main.py)
Python 3.10+ (requirements.txt, multiple .py files), Werkzeug web framework (import statements in controllers)
POST /auth_oauth/signin OAuth2 authentication callback (addons/auth_oauth/controllers/main.py:145), GET /web/login User login page (addons/auth_signup/controllers/main.py:21)
